step.name: baseline
step.action: Measure precision@10 + p99 latency for BM25-only and vector-only.

step.name: pick-fusion
step.action: If native hybrid endpoint exists → use it (RRF by default). Else → manual two-call with RRF in code.

step.name: alpha-schedule
step.action: If linear fusion: define alpha schedule by query shape. If RRF: skip.

step.name: rerank-decision
step.action: If precision < 0.85 AND latency < budget - 100 ms → enable reranker; fetch top-100 → rerank to top-10.
step.decision-gate: If precision still < 0.85 with rerank enabled, do NOT ship hybrid — fall back to simpler retriever and document.

step.name: bench
step.action: Re-run eval on held-out set; record precision@10 + p99 in `metrics` block.
